name: @flying-pillow/mission
description: Mission terminal control surface where developers run the workflow

scripts.airport:status: pnpm --filter @flying-pillow/mission-core build && pnpm --filter @flying-pillow/mission-adapters build && tsx src/index.ts airport:status
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @flying-pillow/mission-core build && pnpm --filter @flying-pillow/mission-adapters build && rm -rf build && rm -f tsconfig.tsbuildinfo && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node ./scripts/copy-static-assets.mjs
scripts.check: pnpm --filter @flying-pillow/mission-core build && pnpm --filter @flying-pillow/mission-adapters build && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @flying-pillow/mission-core build && pnpm --filter @flying-pillow/mission-adapters build && tsx src/index.ts
scripts.test:daemon-mission: pnpm --filter @flying-pillow/mission-core build && pnpm --filter @flying-pillow/mission-adapters build && tsx src/scripts/daemonMissionSmokeTest.ts
